name: Engineering Leadership and Innovation Knowledge Pack — Source Registry
policy: Sources are REGISTERED REFERENCES compiled from general professional knowledge for governance and attribution. They are NOT freshly retrieved documents: retrievedUtc is null and exact URLs/text must be independently verified before any citation or use. The pack contains only ORIGINAL summaries — no verbatim copying of any source. verbatimCopyAllowed is false for every source. Concept families (e.g. ThoughtWorks-style continuous-delivery practice) are registered as topic families, not specific articles; no titles or authors are asserted.

sources.title: DORA / Accelerate — software delivery performance metrics and research (family)
sources.publisher: DORA (DevOps Research and Assessment) / Accelerate State of DevOps research
sources.licenseNote: © DORA / respective publishers. Research material; attribution required, no verbatim redistribution implied.
sources.allowedUse: Original summary of widely-known delivery-metric concepts only.
sources.verificationStatus: Reference registered from general knowledge; not fetched — verify current findings and exact URL before citing.
sources.limitationNote: Metrics are context-dependent and describe systems, not individuals. Not a benchmark guarantee.

sources.title: Google SRE — site reliability engineering practices incl. SLO/SLI and error budgets (family)
sources.licenseNote: © Google. Public material; attribution required, verbatim reuse limited.
sources.allowedUse: Original summary of SRE principles only.
sources.verificationStatus: Reference registered; verify current guidance before citing.
sources.limitationNote: Reliability practices must be adapted to local context; not a reliability guarantee.

sources.title: OWASP — secure-by-design and application-security guidance (family)
sources.licenseNote: OWASP content is typically open-licensed (e.g., CC); confirm licence per page.
sources.allowedUse: Original summary of secure-development concepts only.
sources.verificationStatus: Reference registered; verify current guidance before citing.
sources.limitationNote: Secure-development awareness only; not a security assurance.

sources.title: NIST — public secure software development and risk-management guidance (e.g. SSDF, CSF, RMF) (family)
sources.publisher: National Institute of Standards and Technology (US)
sources.licenseNote: US Government work — generally public domain; verify per publication.
sources.allowedUse: Original summary; public-domain status to be confirmed per document.
sources.verificationStatus: Reference registered; verify current publication before citing.
sources.limitationNote: Security/risk awareness only; not a control certification.

sources.title: CNCF / Cloud Native Computing Foundation — cloud-native and platform patterns (family)
sources.licenseNote: CNCF material is often open-licensed; confirm licence per page.
sources.allowedUse: Original summary of cloud-native principles only.
sources.verificationStatus: Reference registered; verify current guidance before citing.
sources.limitationNote: Principles only; full cloud-native tooling is not required for a local-first estate.

sources.title: Microsoft Learn — engineering, DevOps, platform and security guidance (family)
sources.licenseNote: © Microsoft. Docs under Microsoft terms; verbatim reuse limited.
sources.allowedUse: Original summary of documented practice only.
sources.verificationStatus: Reference registered; verify against current docs for the targeted product/version.
sources.limitationNote: Guidance can change between product versions; verify for the deployed version.

sources.title: InfoQ — software-architecture and engineering-practice reporting (concept family)
sources.licenseNote: © respective authors/publisher. Reporting; attribution required, no verbatim redistribution implied.
sources.allowedUse: Original summary of widely-discussed practice concepts only.
sources.verificationStatus: Concept family registered; no specific article asserted — verify before citing.
sources.limitationNote: Practitioner opinion varies; not a standard or guarantee.

sources.title: Continuous-delivery and engineering-practice concept family (e.g. trunk-based development, technology radar style)
sources.publisher: Practitioner community (ThoughtWorks-style concepts) — not a specific publication
sources.licenseNote: © respective publishers. Concepts referenced as a family; no verbatim text reproduced.
sources.allowedUse: Original summary of widely-established delivery concepts only.
sources.verificationStatus: Concept family registered; no specific article/author asserted — verify before citing.
sources.limitationNote: Concept-level reference only; practices must be adapted to context.

sources.allowedUse: Original summary of the ADR concept only.
sources.verificationStatus: Concept family registered; verify current templates before adopting.
sources.limitationNote: Templates vary across teams; concept-level reference only.

sources.title: Engineering management, change management and innovation-delivery literature (topic family)
sources.publisher: Management/operations venues and reputable practitioner bodies — not a specific paper
sources.licenseNote: No specific article reproduced; original synthesis only.
sources.allowedUse: Original summary of widely-established concepts only.
sources.verificationStatus: Candidate research source — verification required. No DOI/title/author asserted; verify before formal citation.
sources.limitationNote: Not a citation. General management/leadership concepts only; not financial, legal, or HR advice.
